text:
やあ、キミなら
受けてくれると思っていたよ。

この間の一件以来、ライトくんが
危ないだの何だのと口やかましくてね。

キミが一緒に来てくれるのなら
彼も何も言うまい。

それでは行くとしようか。
よろしく
Ah, I thought you'd accept this request.

Ever since the recent incident, Wright just
won't stop blabbering on about danger
and all of that nonsense.

If you were to accompany me... Well. Even he
couldn't complain about that.

Now, let us be on our way.
I'm counting on you.
